body:
## Summary

- Fixes #1813 by requiring explicit automation evidence before treating a `Working session summary` comment as hive-mind generated.
- Adds a hidden marker to newly posted automated working-session summaries while preserving legacy footer-based detection.
- Adds a regression test and a case study with redacted incident evidence for the duplicate-summary run.

## Root cause

Codex posted a real PR comment that began with `## Working session summary`. The auto-summary guard filtered that comment out because the visible heading was listed as a generic tool marker, so hive-mind concluded there were no AI-authored comments after the session start and posted a duplicate automated summary.

## Reproduction

Before the fix:

```sh
node tests/test-issue-1813-codex-summary-dedup.mjs
```

failed because the visible `## Working session summary` heading alone was classified as tool-generated.

## Tests

- `node tests/test-issue-1813-codex-summary-dedup.mjs`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run format:check`
- `npm test` - all 213 default test files passed
- `git diff --check`

Note: local `npm ci` completed with the existing Node engine warning because this environment uses Node v20.20.2 while the package declares `>=24`.

comments.body:
## Working session summary

Implemented and pushed the fix for issue #1813.

PR #1815 is updated and ready: https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/pull/1815  
Commit: `055a1a0f`

The fix changes working-session summary detection so a visible `## Working session summary` heading alone no longer makes a comment “tool-generated.” Automated summaries now carry a hidden marker, while legacy automated summaries are still recognized by their footer. I also added a regression test for the Codex-authored summary case, updated related summary tests, added a changeset, and documented the incident under the issue case study artifacts.

Verification passed:
- `node tests/test-issue-1813-codex-summary-dedup.mjs`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run format:check`
- `npm test` with all 213 selected test files passing
- GitHub Actions run `25975906633` completed successfully
- Working tree is clean on `issue-1813-ab79cdd78da8`

References checked: GitHub REST docs for [working with comments](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/guides/working-with-comments) and [issues/comments](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/issues/issues).

---
*This summary was automatically extracted from the AI working session output.*
